title: super_scary.jar
description: A super serious and super scary horror mod!
body: # DEEP FRIED UPDATE OUT NOW! Presenting… ![](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/6604f4c0a90cb3fb26040f5a8a96327f33558276.png) The most thrilling and spine-chilling Minecraft mod ever conceived! It is the pinnacle of horror, the epitome of terror, and the zenith of dread! When you play this mod, your pants will be pooped, and the poop will not be yours!   # DISCLAIMERS (BECAUSE EVERY HORROR MOD NEEDS THEM) \- mod will make your world go bye-bye \- shaders will make the mod's visual effects and several events go bye-bye \- mod will make multiplayer stability go bye-bye (I'm currently working on this) \- mod will swear at you and make your feelings go bye-bye \- mod will NOT call in a Boeing B-52H Stratofortress bomber to deploy an AGM-86B cruise missile at your location and make you, your home, and your neighborhood go bye-bye (but we are currently hard at work implementing this feature!)   # FEATURES \- over 10 spooky new entities to make you feel disturbed, each with their own unique behavior, interactions, and mechanics! \- more than 20 random events that occur while you play and are bound to have you quivering in your boots! \- interactive chat sequences. Entities will react to your messages and actions! \- a helpful Friend who will guide you at every step of your journey! He is your ally and your confidant; he will always be there for you, providing you with helpful advice and answering all your questions with no judgment whatsoever! \- a fix for Minecraft's infamous "inventory issue"! \- edutainment! (details regarding entities/events are omitted due to major spoilers; check the wiki if you would like to see a full list regardless)   # REVIEWS (REAL CUSTOMERS, NOT PAID ACTORS) \- When I launched the game, I immediately went into cardiac arrest and died. \- When I was playing super\_scary.jar, I was more scared than I've ever been in my entire life! The mod creator was holding me at gunpoint and forcing me to play his godawful mod. \- super\_scary.jar is a brilliant addition to the "psychological horror" genre, because it is horrifying to consider that there exists someone psychologically disturbed enough to create this.   # Links [Discord](https://discord.com/invite/RHpygkc9dG) [Wiki (WIP)](https://github.com/DiamondWalker/super_scary.jar/wiki) [Soundtrack](https://www.youtube.com/playlist?list=PLZ5gDBsIq4LnBKW0SnqA0N-4Gt42O8PuX)   # Credits DiamondWalker - mod creator & owner, coding, sprites, sound effects, and music Rocket - some suggestions and entity concepts Kevin Macleod - "Who Likes to Party" - used for the party event ([https://incompetech.com/music/royalty-free/index.html?Search=Search&isrc=USUAN1200075](https://incompetech.com/music/royalty-free/index.html?Search=Search&isrc=USUAN1200075)) TILIADESIGN from freesound.org - "Light - Heavy lights turned on" - used for Fried Steve's blackout effect ([https://freesound.org/s/486536/](https://freesound.org/s/486536/)) RoozyDB from freesound.org - "Gun cock.wav" - used for the Deadeye's reload animation ([https://freesound.org/s/421794/](https://freesound.org/s/421794/)) TheNikonProductions from freesound.org - "Gun Sound 1", "Gun Sound 2", "Gun Sound 3", and "Gun Sound 4" -  used for the Deadeye ([https://freesound.org/s/337696/](https://freesound.org/s/337696/), [https://freesound.org/s/337697/](https://freesound.org/s/337697/), [https://freesound.org/s/337698/](https://freesound.org/s/337698/), and [https://freesound.org/s/337699/](https://freesound.org/s/337699/)) Erik Pritzens from freesound.org - "Snoring" - used for the snore event ([https://freesound.org/s/151557/](https://freesound.org/s/151557/)) Inspirations: The Broken Script, no\_moon.jar, wonderland.jar, The Collinlock16 Continuity, Spooky's Jumpscare Mansion, Stranger Things, Imscared, Undertale/Deltarune Special Thanks: NotAnNPC\_
